# Tayyub Yaqoob

> UK-based senior digital analyst and AI analytics systems specialist. Architects proprietary analytics and automation systems used by 50+ client teams. Technical publication record across Cointelegraph and AlphaWire, with archive continuity evidence where publisher structures changed. Quoted as expert source by CCN. Invited chapter reviewer for IGI Global.

## Key pages
- [Home](/): Positioning, client exposure, quantified credibility signals, and reviewer-first routing.
- [Evidence](/evidence): Structured evidence index covering role, systems, publications, recognition, code, and archive continuity.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Production analytics and AI workflow case studies.
- [Publications](/publications): Direct live article URLs plus archive continuity proof for removed or unstable publisher surfaces.
- [Recognition](/recognition): External recognition, CCN expert-source context, and IGI Global completed review record.
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Verbatim client quotes from BBC, General Mills (Blue Buffalo), Diligent Pharma, and MRI Management.
- [Labs](/labs): Independent product work and experiments, including LedgerTouch.
- [About](/about): Bio, credentials, and operating principles.
- [Press kit](/press): Bios, fact sheet, expert topics, and media assets.
- [Code](/open-source): Public engineering profile and active repositories.
- [Contact](/contact): Senior roles, consulting, speaking, publication requests, and evidence requests.

## Recognition signals
- 35+ technical articles across Cointelegraph and AlphaWire, combining live URLs with archive continuity where needed
- Quoted as expert source by CCN
- 3 completed chapter reviews for IGI Global (CBDCs, blockchain consensus for IoT-based banking, AI-enabled IoT for FinTech)
- 12 AI/ML credentials — Google AI Agents, AWS ML Specialty exam prep, Vertex AI MLOps, Model Context Protocol with Agentic AI, Agentic AI for Developers, OpenAI Generative AI, AI Ethics & Safety, TensorFlow Deep Learning
- MSc Computing Science, University of Stirling
- Verbatim client testimonials from BBC, General Mills (Blue Buffalo), Diligent Pharma, MRI Management
- 12+ named client programmes shipped via 8 Million Stories
- 8 proprietary analytics systems in production; 50+ client teams on the platform on a weekly cadence

## Current focus
AI agents and machine learning in production, AI-search disruption to organic visibility, consent-mode transparency, measurement-platform accountability. Building LedgerTouch — an independent analytics platform — outside agency work.
